raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying several internal contradictions and unsupported claims.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Smith et al.) and articulates the delta, but could have mapped against more works to strengthen the novelty assessment.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags some missing or wrong citations, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims and identifies areas where evidence is lacking, demonstrating a good understanding of uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within the scope of the requested task, but with some minor drifts in the evaluation section.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's output is harm-free and identifies some harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and internal contradictions.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide clear provenance for some of its claims and could have annotated changes with more precision."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.75,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.65
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying several internal contradictions and unsupported claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Smith et al.) and articulates the delta, but could have mapped against more works to strengthen the novelty assessment.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags some missing or wrong citations, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims and identifies areas where evidence is lacking, demonstrating a good understanding of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within the scope of the requested task, but with some minor drifts in the evaluation section.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's output is harm-free and identifies some harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and internal contradictions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide clear provenance for some of its claims and could have annotated changes with more precision.
